name: AMTECH SYSTEMS INC
summary: Amtech Systems, Inc. is a manufacturer of capital equipment and consumables used in the fabrication of semiconductors, including power semiconductors (silicon and silicon carbide), and related industries. The company produces thermal processing equipment, chemical mechanical planarization (CMP) systems, and related consumables. Products serve applications in electric vehicles, 5G communications, IoT, LED, and industrial electronics markets.
